headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -72.8)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 33% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 126 quotes including 91 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger with real force today.

• At 51.9, frustration levels remain well above the typical range, though down from yesterday's even higher peak.

• Optimism stays deeply suppressed at -36.1, barely recovering from yesterday's low despite having 23 strong-intensity quotes.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
